name: reduardo7
description: Persistent memory system for Claude Code

plugins.name: claude-project-memory
plugins.description: Project-scoped long-term memory for Claude Code. Unlike per-user tools, the knowledge vault lives inside the repository — shared across the team, versioned in git, and navigable as an Obsidian graph. Raw session logs are captured automatically and distilled via /memory-digest into curated, cross-linked docs. The vault grows over time, making Claude progressively smarter for everyone working on the project.
